headlines.title: SANITATION BOARD PLANS SUBMITTED
headlines.subtitle: Davis Gets Draft of Proposals for Supervision of Health. OPPOSITION IS EXPRESSED. Too Much Power Is Given, Say Some-Control of Schools Fought.
headlines.fullText: A draft of plans for the proposed city sanitation board, prepared by the committee recently appointed to ree- to Commissioner R. M. Davis Saturday. The board as proposed is to consist of two physicians, one veterinarian and a member of the City Federation of Women's Clube, recommended The health commission and appointed by the mayor. The henith commisaloper and the city health officer are Vision of the santiary condition of the city, including the hospitale, falls and schools and empowers it to aid the health commissioner in efforts to educate the public in hygienic matters. The city chemist is to make all bacteriological examinations of water. The dairy Inapector is to have charge and the health of dairy here inspector The market Inspector is to finve charge of the enforcement of the clean food ordinances. Sanitary inspectors are to be under the direction of the board and the health commissleser. Monthly meetings in the city commission room at city hall, and an af-nual report on health conditions, the work of the board and its finances The new draft is much less cumpre-hetime than the first forms of a health ready in being expressed, on the ground that the provisions afe yet too liberal. Control of the city hospital, for one thing, will meet opposition, it is asserted this could not legally be done, the control being is the hands of the the proposed parde Fort Worth, and the schools was one of the matters leading to protest against a board of health.

headlines.title: MINNETONKA IS NAME OF LAKE AT RESERVOIR
headlines.subtitle: J. C. Lord Suggests Title Which Meets With Approval. Biggest in Texas.
headlines.fullText: Lake Minnetonka was adopted July 4 as the name for the big lake that will be impounded by the West Fork The name was suggested by J. C. Lord, superintendent of construction at the dam_ Translated from the Indian tongue. it means "Girent Water" It will be the greatest inland lake in Texas, having thirty-mile circumference. There is a Lake Minnetonka in Minnesota, but the name will be distinct-ve in the Southwest. The name will become even more an-propriate as canots are put on' the property of John fawkes of the board but cances and other boats on the lake after the dam is completed. headlines.title: SUGAR FRAUD CONVICT WHOM TAFT FREED DIES
headlines.subtitle: Long Illness Fatal to Man Found Guilty of Customs Conspiracy. By Associated Press.
headlines.fullText: SEABRIGHT, N. J. July 5. - Charles IL Heike, former secretary and trens-urer of the American Sugar Refining Company, convicted of conspiracy t derweighing, 22: me through win of the national council on edu. commuted by President Tift, died last night. He has been ill since his conviction.

headlines.title: WORKS WOULD CEANGE APPOINTMENT SYSTEM
headlines.subtitle: Senator's Cill Provides Commission and Prohibits Members Making
headlines.fullText: duced Monday by Senator Works. It Is designed to prevent public offices from being used as political re-wanis and the chief effect would be to take from senators, representatives and party leaders their present power of recommending candidates. The proposed committee, appointed by each President at the opening of his form of office. Buna would be prohibited from making for-would make no selection on the late political regards" The bill provides a salary of $6,000 a year for each commissiotier.

headlines.title: NO CLEW TO BANDITS
headlines.subtitle: Posses Scouring Woods for Illinois Central Robbers Unsuccessful.
headlines.fullText: MEMPHIS, Tenn., July &-Ponses In detectives reported today that no clews the two bandits who held up and robbed Illinois Central southbound passenger train No. 1 early yesterday. The Tallahatchle river bottoms the vicinity of Batesville, Miss. scene of the hold-up, are almost fmpenetrable in places and it is that the robbers still are concealed in the dense woods.
